scripts.dev: concurrently -n "backend,frontend,electron" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: cross-env ELECTRON_IS_DEV=true wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3001 && cd electron && cross-env ELECTRON_IS_DEV=true npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
